metadata.checkpoint: Checkpoint 2 — raw data through clustered output only
metadata.trustpilot_status: reused existing 90 validation records; no re-pull
metadata.model_used_for_extraction_and_clustering: configured GPT-5.5 endpoint / current Hermes model with deterministic post-processing

filtering_notes.reddit: approved six subreddits only; career/venting exclusions and task-noun requirement applied

clusters.cluster_name: M365 permissions, mailbox, and user admin toil
clusters.description: IT/MSP teams manually manage Microsoft 365 permissions, mailboxes, onboarding/offboarding, MFA resets, service health checks, and tenant administration.
Users cannot resolve payment, onboarding, platform, or configuration problems quickly because support is slow, unavailable, or pushes them through repeated tickets.
evidence: Bad support Very bad customer service
log about 4 tickets before I actually got a support agent

clusters.description: Finance and FP&A teams manually stitch reports, forecasts, models, and spreadsheet packs across Excel, ERPs, and fragmented data sources.
evidence: MIS reporting file alone is around 30MB

clusters.description: Vendors and operators struggle with Coupa, Ariba, BILL, and similar portals for invoice submission, supplier onboarding, payment status, and getting paid.
evidence: trying to get Coupa to submit my first invoice

clusters.description: Bookkeeping and accounting users do not trust bank feeds, card statements, or statement imports and still reconcile transactions manually.
evidence: avoid double-counting transactions from the bank feeds
the data never reconciles at a global

clusters.cluster_name: Manual close, ledger, journal, and rollforward work
clusters.description: Accounting teams still perform month-end close, ledger cleanup, journal entries, provisions, and rollforwards through recurring manual work.
evidence: record my journal entries from the general ledger

clusters.cluster_name: Manual data entry in bookkeeping operations
clusters.description: Bookkeepers and operators still enter invoices, inventory, item statements, chart-of-account changes, and transaction details by hand.
evidence: spend so much time on data entry

clusters.description: Automation users describe workflows that still require manual handoffs, fragmented tools, brittle scripts, or human follow-up to close the loop.
evidence: automate away all of the manual steps

clusters.cluster_name: Slow, buggy enterprise systems block routine work
clusters.description: Users complain that enterprise platforms are slow, unintuitive, unstable, or buggy enough to block routine operational tasks.
evidence: slow and absolutely loaded with bugs

clusters.cluster_name: Manual invoice, receipt, and PO matching
clusters.description: Accounting and procurement users still match invoices, receipts, purchase orders, and supporting documents manually or with brittle OCR/workarounds.
evidence: 2/3 way matching invoices and purchase orders

clusters.description: Teams lack reliable controls for operational compliance data such as contact records, access state, audit trails, DLP criteria, and incident reporting thresholds.
